title: Gemini 3 Flash now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body: Gemini 3 Flash is now available as a Databricks-hosted model. This model offers speed and scale without compromising quality, with advanced multimodal capabilities for complex video analysis, data extraction, and visual Q&As. For more information, see [Gemini 3 Flash](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#gemini-3-flash).
